recommendations.title: Crazy About Her
recommendations.overview: After a magical night together, Adri voluntarily turns himself into the psychiatric institution where Carla lives.

recommendations.title: The Best Summer of My Life
recommendations.overview: A father in financial problems takes his son on vacation as he tries to solve his life.

recommendations.title: You Keep the Kids
recommendations.overview: Flora and Victor are fun, modern, caring parents. That is, until they decide to get a divorce, and the perfect job opportunity turns up for them. They now have one problem: custody.

recommendations.title: The Wedding Unplanner

recommendations.title: The Royal Tenenbaums
recommendations.overview: Royal Tenenbaum and his wife Etheline had three children and then they separated. All three children are extraordinary --- all geniuses. Virtually all memory of the brilliance of the young Tenenbaums was subsequently erased by two decades of betrayal

recommendations.title: Z
recommendations.overview: A prominent politician is murdered during a demonstration. The government and army are trying to suppress the truth, but a tenacious magistrate is determined to not to let them get away with it.

recommendations.title: Music Box
recommendations.overview: A lawyer defends her father accused of war crimes, but there is more to the case than she suspects.

recommendations.title: The Confession

recommendations.title: State of Siege
recommendations.overview: Assigned to South America, US official Philip Michael Santore is employed by a counterinsurgency agency. His position makes him a target for a local band of guerrillas, and, before long, Santore is kidnapped. As a prisoner, he undergoes interrogation
